user.title: Connect to Flowwave
user.description: Paste the device token from **flowwave.nl → Devices → Connect Flow One**, then choose which sensors to send. Power sensors are converted to watts automatically.

error.invalid_token: Flowwave didn't accept that device token. Copy it again from your Devices page.
error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach flowwave.nl. Check the internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Flowwave device is already set up.

init.title: Flowwave sensors
init.description: Change which sensors are sent to Flowwave, or the update interval.
